title: GraphEdge
description: A directed edge in a graph.
$comment:
This is a graph edge type used in Stencila for representing provenance,
reactivity and other graphs.

Edge direction is always from `source` upstream dependency to `target`
downstream dependant.
Both endpoints reference `GraphNode.id` values.

type.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@type` keyword.

id.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@id` keyword.

source.description: The id of the upstream dependency graph node.

target.description: The id of the downstream dependant graph node.

kind.description: The kind of dependency relationship represented by this edge.
